about.title: For Understanding and Dialogue
about.subtitle: Founded in Istanbul in 2010, KIM Foundation builds bridges to introduce Islam to non-Muslim visitors, students, and residents through educational and cultural initiatives.
about.missionText: To strengthen cross-cultural understanding and dialogue by providing people from different backgrounds with direct and authentic encounters with Islam.
about.visionText: To build a world where cultural and religious differences serve as bridges, and where understanding and respect prevail.

volunteer.subtitle: Join our volunteer team to build bridges of understanding and dialogue.

howILiveIslam.title: How I Live Islam
howILiveIslam.subtitle: Practical, honest guidance for living a Muslim life in the modern world — from the first prayer to building a faith-centred community.
howILiveIslam.comingSoonBanner: Full section in development — detailed guides, video content, and community resources coming soon.
howILiveIslam.quote: Take one deed — the one most beloved to you — and be consistent with it. For Allah does not tire of giving reward until you tire of doing good.
howILiveIslam.back: Back to New Muslim Care Area

prayer.title: Prayer Life
prayer.desc: How to establish the five daily prayers, find the Qibla direction, and build consistency in worship.

halal.title: Halal Living
halal.desc: Navigating halal food, ethical consumption, and making Islamic choices in a non-Muslim society.

finance.title: Islamic Finance
finance.desc: Understanding Riba-free banking, Zakat calculation, and ethical wealth management.

family.title: Family & Marriage
family.desc: Islamic perspective on marriage, family roles, and raising children with faith.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Finding your Muslim community, mosque etiquette, and building brotherhood and sisterhood.

dawah.title: Dawah
dawah.desc: Sharing Islam with wisdom and kindness — how to speak about your faith naturally and confidently.

newMuslimCareArea.badge: KİM Vakfı · New Muslim Care Area
newMuslimCareArea.heroSubtitle: Whether you are exploring Islam for the first time, a new Muslim finding your footing, or deepening a lifelong faith — this is your complete care system.
newMuslimCareArea.systemSubtitle: Not a course. Not a list of facts. A complete system designed to walk you from your first question all the way to living Islam with confidence.
newMuslimCareArea.discoverDesc: You arrive with questions. Who is Allah? What is Islam? Is there evidence for God? This is where curiosity begins.
newMuslimCareArea.understandDesc: You explore Islamic belief, worship, ethics, the Quran, and the Prophet ﷺ through our structured educational journey.
newMuslimCareArea.connectDesc: You build a personal relationship with Allah — through prayer, du'a, gratitude, and spiritual reflection.
newMuslimCareArea.liveDesc: You begin to embody Islam in your daily life — in how you pray, eat, interact, raise a family, and serve your community.
newMuslimCareArea.choosePathSub: Three complete journeys, each at your own pace.
newMuslimCareArea.whoWeAreDesc: Meet KİM Vakfı — our mission, vision, centers, and the global community behind this work.
newMuslimCareArea.whatIsIslamDesc: A structured journey through Islamic belief, worship, ethics, and rational conviction — built for the curious mind.
newMuslimCareArea.howILiveDesc: Practical guidance on prayer, halal living, Islamic finance, family, community, and everyday Muslim life.
newMuslimCareArea.partnerLocationsDesc: We have active partnerships in over 80 countries. Connect with an Islamic center near you through our global network.
newMuslimCareArea.suleymaniyeAppDesc: Our interactive mosque tablet app gives visitors an immersive, multilingual digital experience right inside the mosque complex.
newMuslimCareArea.madrasaToursDesc: Tour our three Istanbul centers — KİM 1 (Visitor Centre), KİM 2 (Madrasa), and KİM 3 (Media) — in person or virtually.
newMuslimCareArea.volunteerDesc: Whether in Istanbul or anywhere in the world, join our volunteer team and contribute to the mission of cross-cultural understanding.
newMuslimCareArea.partnersSubtitle: KİM Vakfı works with Islamic organizations, universities, and centers across 80+ countries to extend the reach of authentic Islamic education.
